headlines.description: — LaMelo Ball made a layup with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, Miles Bridges blocked Davion Mitchell's attempt at a winning layup at the buzzer, and the Charlotte Hornets beat Miami 127-126 in...

headlines.shortLinkText: Trail Blazers beat Suns 114-110 after clawing back from an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter
